prompt:
SYSTEM CONTEXT SNAPSHOT — Omni-Studio v2.0 State of the Union

What we built in this session (July 20-21, 2026):

## CORE ARCHITECTURE
- Volt Dashboard (React+TypeScript+Vite+Tailwind) is the SOLE UI, served at /app
- Backend: FastAPI omni.py on port 8500 with 50+ API endpoints
- 4 SQLite databases: dashboard.db, contacts.db, samples.db, studio_crm.db
- 1,907 audio files analyzed and cataloged with key/tempo detection

## WHAT GOT WIRED
1. Databases → omni.py: dashboard.db (tasks, agents, plugins, sites, swarm_runs, activity_log), contacts.db (full CRM CRUD), samples.db (1,907 analyzed audio files), studio_crm.db (lead pipeline, pitches, payments, sessions, media_contacts)
2. API endpoints added: contacts CRUD + stats, vault all/stats, DAW watcher (status, exports, scan), system health (disk, agents, tasks, databases), lead pipeline (CRUD, stats, scan-library, audit-payments, media-contacts, payments, sessions)
3. Scripts wired: music_library_aggregator.py → POST /api/leads/scan-library, audit_missed_funds.py → POST /api/leads/audit-payments
4. Still NOT wired: income_watchdog.py (Gmail payment detection), press_pitch_generator.py, generate_national_contacts.py

## DASHBOARD SECTIONS (13 total)
METRICS, ANALYZERS, PROSPECTS, LEDGER, LEADS, AGENTS, TASKS, SWARM, SAMPLES, VAULT, ACTIVITY, SYSTEM, PIPELINE

## MUSIC LIBRARY AGENT (just completed)
- agents/music_library_aggregator.py — scans 12 APM/UPM sub-libraries (KPM, Bruton, Kosinus, Sonoton, Cezame, Liquid Cinema, FirstCom, Chappell, Atmosphere, Elias Music, Chronic Trax, Capitol Studio Masters)
- Uses Serper API for LinkedIn dorking + Gemini for contact extraction
- Dry-run mode with fixtures: MLA_DRY_RUN=1
- 17 tests all passing in tests/test_music_library_aggregator.py
- view_leads.py enhanced with music library dashboard + CSV export
- docs/runbooks/music_library_aggregator.md created
- master_orchestrator.py already has entry (runs every ~24h)

## KEY FILES
- /Users/mtb/Omni-Studio/dashboard/omni.py — main backend (~1400 lines)
- /Users/mtb/Omni-Studio/dashboard/contacts.py — CRM CRUD
- /Users/mtb/Omni-Studio/dashboard/sample_scanner.py — audio analysis (fixed key detection)
- /Users/mtb/Omni-Studio/dashboard/sample_library.py — sample SQLite
- /Users/mtb/Omni-Studio/dashboard/bridge.py — Kimi↔Omni bridge
- /Users/mtb/Omni-Studio/dashboard/daw_watcher.py — DAW export detection
- /Users/mtb/Omni-Studio/agents/music_library_aggregator.py — A&R discovery
- /Users/mtb/Omni-Studio/scripts/view_leads.py — CLI lead viewer
- /Users/mtb/Omni-Studio/scripts/income_watchdog.py — Gmail payment detection
- /Users/mtb/Omni-Studio/scripts/audit_missed_funds.py — historical payment auditor
- /Users/mtb/Omni-Studio/volt-dashboard/ — React dashboard
- /Users/mtb/Omni-Studio/data/studio_crm.db — lead pipeline + music library targets
- /Users/mtb/Omni-Studio/data/tracks.json — 198 track analysis results
- /Users/mtb/Omni-Studio/migrate_music_library_schema.py — schema migration

## KIMI INTEGRATION
- Kimi API key in .env: KIMI_API_KEY
- moonshot-v1-128k for 128k context extraction
- Daily pipeline at midnight (cron)
- Bridge: omni_to_kimi() queues tasks, kimi_to_omni() receives from Kimi
- Bridge dir: data/bridge/pending/ and data/bridge/completed/

## WHAT TO DO NEXT
1. Wire income_watchdog.py to API endpoint
2. Wire press_pitch_generator.py to API endpoint
3. Add real Serper + Gemini API keys for production music library scanning
4. Consider real-time dashboard updates (WebSocket)
5. Consider migrating from SQLite to PostgreSQL for concurrent writes
